inputs.label: Nap Duration (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of each nap in minutes. Dymaxion schedule typically uses 30-minute naps.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of each nap in minutes. Dymaxion schedule typically uses 30-minute naps.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her şekerlemenin dakika cinsinden süresi. Dymaxion programı tipik olarak 30 dakikalık şekerlemeler kullanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer jedes Nickerchens in Minuten. Der Dymaxion-Zeitplan verwendet typischerweise 30-minütige Nickerchen.

inputs.label: Interval Between Naps (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time between the start of each nap. Standard Dymaxion interval is 6 hours, resulting in 4 naps per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time between the start of each nap. Standard Dymaxion interval is 6 hours, resulting in 4 naps per day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her şekerlemenin başlangıcı arasındaki süre. Standart Dymaxion aralığı 6 saattir, bu da günde 4 şekerleme ile sonuçlanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit zwischen dem Beginn jedes Nickerchens. Standard-Dymaxion-Intervall beträgt 6 Stunden, was 4 Nickerchen pro Tag ergibt.

inputs.label: Total Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive days to calculate total sleep duration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive days to calculate total sleep duration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam uyku süresini hesaplamak için ardışık gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl aufeinanderfolgender Tage zur Berechnung der Gesamtschlafdauer.

inputs.label: Baseline Monophasic Sleep (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Recommended monophasic sleep duration used for efficiency comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Recommended monophasic sleep duration used for efficiency comparison.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verimlilik karşılaştırması için kullanılan önerilen tek fazlı uyku süresi.

breakdown: Number of naps per day: ${napsPerDay.toFixed(1)} (standard Dymaxion: 4).
Efficiency relative to ${baseSleepHours}h monophasic: ${efficiencyPercent.toFixed(1)}% (lower means less sleep).
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
